ROSAT_2RXS.catalogue: ROSAT All-Sky Survey Faint Source Catalogue (2RXS)
ROSAT_2RXS.note: No ROSAT source within 30 arcsec of target position.

XMM_4XMM_DR13.note: Source likely not in any XMM pointed observation field. Upper limit conditional on sky coverage.

eROSITA_eRASS1.note: Source at l=32.1° is in the eastern Galactic hemisphere (l < 180°), assigned to the eROSITA-RU consortium. eRASS1 data from Merloni et al. (2024) covers only the western hemisphere (l = 180-360°). No public eROSITA data available for this sky position as of 2024.

VLASS.catalogue: VLA Sky Survey (VLASS, Lacy et al. 2020)
VLASS.note: Source at Dec = +3.5° is within the VLASS footprint (Dec > -40°). No counterpart found within 5 arcsec. 3σ upper limit: 360 μJy at 3 GHz.

RACS.catalogue: Rapid ASKAP Continuum Survey (RACS-low, McConnell et al. 2020)
RACS.note: Source at Dec = +3.5° is within the RACS footprint (Dec < +49°). No counterpart within 10 arcsec. 3σ upper limit: 750 μJy at 887.5 MHz.

GALEX.note: NUV = 17.52 mag detected. FUV non-detection. NUV flux consistent with G-K giant chromospheric emission; no UV excess suggesting accretion.

2MASS.note: Normal near-IR colours consistent with G8 giant.

WISE.note: No mid-IR excess. W1-W2 = -0.04 consistent with stellar photosphere.

SIMBAD.note: Cross-match returns a single Tycho-2 star. No known binarity or variability flags in literature prior to Gaia DR3.
